name: httpbin_form_fill
task: Fill out the form: customer name is 'Alice Smith', size is Medium, topping is Cheese, and submit

name: herokuapp_login
task: Log in with username 'tomsmith' and password 'SuperSecretPassword!'

name: herokuapp_checkboxes
task: Check both checkboxes on the page

name: herokuapp_dropdown
task: Select 'Option 2' from the dropdown

name: herokuapp_add_remove
task: Click the 'Add Element' button three times, then click the first 'Delete' button

name: herokuapp_forgot_password
task: Enter the email 'test@example.com' and click the Retrieve password button

name: herokuapp_key_presses
task: Click on the input field and type 'hello'

name: books_cheapest
task: Find the cheapest book on this page and click on it to view its details

name: books_travel_category
task: Click on the 'Travel' category in the sidebar

name: books_next_page
task: Click the 'next' button to go to the second page of books

name: wikipedia_search
task: Search for 'reinforcement learning' using the search box and click the search button

name: wikipedia_nav_link
task: Click on the 'Contents' link in the left sidebar

name: herokuapp_basic_auth
task: Enter username 'admin' and password 'admin' in the HTTP auth prompt and submit

name: herokuapp_inputs
task: Click on the number input field and type '42'

name: herokuapp_dynamic_content
task: Click the 'click here' link at the bottom of the page to reload with static content

name: demoqa_textbox
task: Fill the form: Full Name is 'Bob Jones', Email is 'bob@test.com', Current Address is '123 Main St', and click Submit

name: demoqa_checkbox
task: Expand the 'Home' checkbox tree and check the 'Desktop' checkbox

name: demoqa_radio
task: Select the 'Impressive' radio button

name: demoqa_buttons
task: Click the 'Click Me' button

name: saucedemo_login
task: Log in with username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'

name: saucedemo_add_to_cart
task: Log in with username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce', then add the first item to the cart

name: herokuapp_sortable_tables
task: Click on the 'Last Name' column header to sort the table by last name

name: herokuapp_typos
task: Read the page content — no action needed, just scroll down to see the full text

name: httpbin_form_different_data
task: Fill out the form: customer name is 'Bob', size is Large, toppings are Bacon and Onion, and submit

name: books_five_star
task: Find a book with a 5-star rating on this page and click on it
